ai_summary: Miss Melanie Jackson from Augusta, GA has extensive child care experience including Head Start, babysitting, and university childcare settings with toddlers through early elementary. She demonstrates effective conflict resolution by staying calm, listening to both sides, and guiding children to fair solutions while emphasizing empathy and communication.
